title: Support ## delay on implication RHS in SVA properties

features.name: SVA overlapped implication with ##1 delay on RHS
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property using overlapped implication (|->) with a ##1 cycle delay on the RHS sequence

features.name: SVA non-overlapped implication with ##2 delay on RHS
features.description: Code should include an SVA assert property using non-overlapped implication (|=>) with a ##2 cycle delay on the RHS sequence
